name: ClmCOBProdListExtr
Description:

JOB NAME:     ClmCOBProdListExtr

DESCRIPTION:  
    Extracts data from CLM_COB_PROD_LIST.dat and loads the hashed file hf_clm_cob_prod_list.
    

INPUTS:
     Flat File           : CLM_COB_PROD_LIST.dat

OUTPUTS: 
    Hashed file      :  hf_clm_cob_prod_list. 
                    

MODIFICATIONS:

=====================================================================================================================================================
Developer                Date                 Project/Altiris #                                  Change Description                              Development Project      Code Reviewer          Date Reviewed       
=====================================================================================================================================================
Manasa Andru       2013-09-23          TTR - 493                                       Original Programming                               IntegrateNewDevl           Kalyan Neelam         2013-09-27

Annotations:
The hashed file is used in the FctsClmCOBExtr job.This job is called by FctsClmPrereqSeq
